item.title: These Common Household Chemicals Are Impacting Your Heart's Rhythm
item.description: Time to take your heart health into your own hands.

item.title: This Pilates Move Works Your Whole Body In Just A Couple Minutes
item.description: Looking to work your legs, glutes, core, arms, chest, and shoulders in one move?

item.title: Study Shows This Vitamin May Lower Your Risk Of Alzheimer’s By 17%
item.description: And you're probably not getting enough of it

item.title: If Your Gut Health Feels Off, You May Be Lacking These Nutrients
item.description: Nothing fishy about these gut-supporting fatty acids.

item.title: MIT Scientists Discover Why We “Zone Out” & Why It's A Good Thing
item.description: New research from MIT shows why we zone out after a bad night's sleep—and actually it might make you feel a little better about it.
